content: I understand the consequences and want to delete the agent

comment.text: This is the label for a checkbox within a confirmation dialog. It appears when a user attempts to delete an AI agent, requiring them to acknowledge the consequences before proceeding.

usage.context:
{isRoomDelete || isTemplate || isAIAgent ? (
 <Checkbox
 style={{ marginTop: "16px" }}
 label={
 isAIAgent
 ? t("DeleteAIAgentWarning")
 : isTemplate
 ? t("DeleteTemplateWarning")
 : t("DeleteRoomWarning")
 }
 dataTestId="delete_warning_checkbox"
